case_title: LSL PROPERTY HOLDINGS B14 DE, LLC, A DELAWARE VS. ISABEL MARKL et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LSL PROPERTY HOLDINGS B14 DE, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SERVED DEC-17-2011, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL.

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT, QUASH/RECALL WRIT OF POSSESION OF REAL PROPERTY AND DISMISS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF LSL PROPERTY HOLDINGS B14 DE, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LSL PROPERTY HOLDINGS B14 DE, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARKL, ISABEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2677 LARKIN STREET, UNIT NUMBER 703, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO SERVED PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LSL PROPERTY HOLDINGS B14 DE, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SERVED DEC-17-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARKL, ISABEL
DECLARATION OF DAVID P. WASSERMAN, ESQ. RE COPY OF LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LSL PROPERTY HOLDINGS B14 DE, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
ORDER TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT, QUASH/RECALL WRIT OF POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY, AND DISMISS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MARKL, ISABEL
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MARKL, ISABEL
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MARKL, ISABEL

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LSL PROPERTY HOLDINGS B14 DE, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT MARKL, ISABEL DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $95.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF LSL PROPERTY HOLDINGS B14 DE, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
